assets.title: Social Short Prompt
assets.pagePrompt: Create a 9:16 social media video of a creator unboxing a compact desk gadget in a bright home studio. Start with a close-up of the package, cut to hands revealing the product, then finish with the gadget glowing on the desk. Fast upbeat pacing, clean daylight, handheld creator style, crisp product details.
assets.historyPrompt: Create a 9:16 social media video of a creator unboxing a compact desk gadget in a bright home studio. assets.description: Vertical AI video example of a creator unboxing a compact desk gadget in a bright home studio.

assets.title: Product Ad Prompt
assets.pagePrompt: Create a 5-second vertical 9:16 cinematic product ad for a fictional sparkling water can called Luma Fizz. Show condensation on the can, citrus slices floating through soft studio light, a slow push-in camera move, premium commercial lighting, and a clean white and indigo background.
assets.historyPrompt: Create a  cinematic product ad for a fictional sparkling water can called Luma Fizz. Show condensation on the can, citrus slices floating through soft studio light, a slow push-in camera move, premium commercial lighting, clean white and indigo background, refreshing mood, polished 16:9 composition.
assets.description: Vertical AI product video example featuring a sparkling water can, citrus slices, and a studio push-in shot.

assets.title: Image-Guided Motion Prompt
assets.pagePrompt: Animate the uploaded product image into a smooth hero video. Preserve the product shape, label placement, colors, and camera angle. Add subtle turntable motion, soft reflections, realistic shadows, and a gentle background light sweep. Keep the result clean, stable, and marketplace-ready.
assets.historyPrompt: Animate the uploaded product image into a smooth hero video. Preserve the product shape, label placement, colors, and camera angle. assets.description: AI image-to-video example with a stable product shape, turntable motion, reflections, and studio lighting.

assets.title: Storyboard Scene Prompt
assets.pagePrompt: Create a short storyboard-style video of a small coffee shop at sunrise. Shot 1: steam rising from a ceramic cup. Shot 2: barista placing a pastry on the counter. Shot 3: morning light moving across a wooden table. Warm color grade, slow camera movement, calm ambient mood, realistic cinematic texture.
